title: Module uses another module without GetDependencies()
description: Code calls cms_utils::get_module() or ModuleOperations to load another module, but the module class likely doesn't declare it in GetDependencies().
explanation: Loading another module at runtime without declaring the dependency in GetDependencies() means CMSMS can't enforce load order or warn when the dependency is missing.
fix: Add the module to GetDependencies() with its minimum required version.
